title: Typed contracts and authority consolidation
goal: Consolidate worker-wire conversion, event vocabulary, attention policy, selected-slice planning, and provenance/follow-up domain fields without adding generic registries or moving daemon-owned semantics into workers/renderers.
acceptance: Use behavioral TDD: add worker-wire golden/compatibility tests, legacy-event/migration tests, attention-action parity tests, and queue/provenance round-trip tests before changing implementations.

WorkerResultWire and RepairResultWire (or equivalent explicit wire structs) exactly describe JSON emitted by Pi workers. Conversion into daemon domain results adds attempts, trigger, immutable attempt identity, and other daemon-owned enrichment; those fields are not falsely required from the agent.

Persisted workflow events use a typed event-kind vocabulary and typed payload structs/constructors at producers and consumers. Legacy string/ad-hoc JSON events remain readable through explicit compatibility decoding with unknown-event preservation.

One deep attention policy maps daemon read-model state to typed attention intents/actions for worker questions, replan decisions, terminal transitions, and pane hygiene; delivery/dedupe remains behind the cockpit seam and non-authoritative.

Run slice selection/queue state is stored as a typed normalized plan or relation rather than a comma-encoded selected_slice_id string, with backward-compatible migration and safe slice IDs still enforced.

GitHub/provenance metadata and follow-up slice drafts move out of overloaded github_issue and summary strings into explicit typed fields/tables/artifacts, with legacy reads and lossless migration tests.
State/status IPC remains harness-neutral JSON, Pi remains the sole real worker harness, fake remains only a deterministic test seam, and renderers remain painters over daemon projections.

No generic repository layer, provider registry, harness registry, phase-based manager split, or shallow pass-through module is introduced. Extract only invariant-bearing wire/event/attention/plan protocols with small deep interfaces.
Public JSON changes are additive/versioned, old run artifacts and SQLite databases remain inspectable, and schema migration is idempotent across repeated startup.
must_ask_if: A daemon-owned field such as repair attempts or trigger must be added to the Pi worker response schema.
Legacy persisted runs/events cannot be read without destructive migration.
A consolidation would create a speculative multi-harness/provider abstraction.
Attention delivery would become authoritative for workflow state or cancellation.
